name: Power Academy RDBMS Sales Training
description: A comprehensive RDBMS competitive intelligence training deck prepared by Aberdeen Group for IBM's Power Academy in January 1996. The document provides detailed competitive analysis of six major RDBMS vendors (Computer Associates/Ingres, IBM DB2, Informix, Oracle, Sybase, Microsoft, Progress, Red Brick, and Software AG) across dimensions including scalability, distributed technology, open technology, development tools, other technologies, and supplier value-add. Financial data, market share, strengths, weaknesses, and IBM-specific selling tips are included.
